info.title: Fleximotion Ops API
info.description: Operational source of truth for operators, vehicles, platform accounts, daily activity, alerts, cash, P&L inputs, and transfer-price events.

post.description: Creates the operational actor linked to Identity person_id. HR may call this through the onboarding handoff.

post.summary: Register operator with a platform account

patch.summary: Update vehicle assignment, status, or details

post.description: Connector boundary for Bolt, Uber, migration, and manual-correction workers. Each record is resolved through the selected platform account and platform_operator_id. Valid records are upserted independently; rejected records are returned in the run errors array.

get.summary: Get the risk-sorted live team board

post.summary: Generate an immutable daily report snapshot

get.summary: Get a generated daily report snapshot

200.description: Registered jobs with freshness and finality state
Notification delivery history for management users

post.summary: Record completion or failure of a scheduled job run
Create a vehicle-class revenue pace profile

get.summary: List finance economics policies used by analytics dashboards

post.summary: Create a finance economics policy for labour, overhead and expected-hour assumptions

get.summary: List fuel and mileage expectation policies

post.summary: Create a fuel and mileage expectation policy
Confirm fuel issued to an operator and vehicle

get.summary: Calculate daily fuel-efficiency and tracker mileage exceptions
Get expected versus remitted cash status
get.description: Finance and manager-facing closeout view. Expected cash is currently derived from platform cash-trip share until exact cash receipts are available from connectors.

get.summary: List finance cash adjustments and evidence references

post.summary: Record a finance cash adjustment or reversal
post.description: Requires service, owner/admin, or an active scoped Finance assignment. Manager-scoped users can review cash status and adjustment history but cannot create adjustments. The API rejects adjustments for accounting periods already closed by Payments.

403.description: Missing Finance authority, or the selected accounting period is locked.

post.summary: Submit or update a supervisor daily closeout
Accept a verified Monnify cash transaction
post.description: Internal service endpoint called by the Payments Integration service after provider verification and account matching.

patch.summary: Attach a provisioned Monnify account to an operator
patch.description: Internal service endpoint called by the Payments Integration service after reserved-account provisioning.

get.description: Canonical operational performance snapshot for TMS and management dashboards.

post.description: Records TMS-created transfer-price events as Ops P&L inputs. This endpoint is idempotent and service-token only.

credentials_key.description: Environment/secrets prefix only; credentials are never returned.

CreateRevenuePaceProfileRequest.description: pace_profile_id is generated by the service.

CreateEconomicsPolicyRequest.description: economics_policy_id is generated by the service.
